hero.footer_established: Est. 2025 in the city of Trier.

creation.quote:
"Art must make attractive
the world of the spirit,
of the invisible,
of God."
creation.attribution:
St. John Paul II
Letter to Artists, Apr 4, 1999
creation.panel_right_1:
Sans Saint emerged
out of the city of Trier
in the Jubilee Year of 2025
creation.panel_right_3:
We want to make art that is
eternal, ethereal, ever-present.

footer.address_gdpr: Responsibility for data processing on this website, within the meaning of the General Data Protection Regulation (GDPR/DSGVO), lies with:
footer.tithe: A tithe of 10 % of our profit is donated to the Carmelite community or to charity causes, as per Leviticus 27:30 and Deuteronomy 14:22.
